name: forge
description: Self-enhancing AI engineering team for Claude Code — generates project-specific SDLC instances from your codebase

plugins.name: forge
plugins.description: [SUNSET — install via the CLI] Self-enhancing AI software development lifecycle. Install with `npm i -g @entelligentsia/forgecli` then `4ge init claude .`. The marketplace plugin is being retired: this version is a migration shim that redirects /forge:init to the CLI-first install (idempotent; preserves your config, store and KB).
